info.name: RegiBase
info.summary: Personal database with custom form templates, encryption and multiple views
info.description:
RegiBase is a lightweight personal database for the information you want to keep — credit cards, bank accounts, online accounts, memberships, licenses, contacts and anything else.
Design your own fields from templates, then browse records as a list, detailed list, spreadsheet-style table (with a frozen first column), cards, or an image gallery.
Features: - Custom form fields with per-field input rules - Optional client-side encryption (AES-GCM) for secret fields — the server never sees the key or plaintext - Password-protected full backup & restore (AES-256 ZIP) - Import from CSV / JSON (e.g. Google Password Manager) or from your Nextcloud Contacts (including photos) - Attach images and files from Nextcloud Files or Notes - Move / copy / merge records between collections - Available in 12 languages
info.author: ktec-jp
